basic_details.job_title: NII Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Senior Research Fellow/ Junior Research Fellow Posts
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Immunology (NII) Senior Research Fellow/Junior Research Fellow (Project) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of NII. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NII Senior Research Fellow/Junior Research Fellow (Project) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. or M.Tech. in any area of life sciences with good academic record, Cleared National Level Eligibility Test (NET/GATE etc) for M.Sc. candidates, At least 2 years of research experience in laboratory settings for SRF, Minimum 6 months dissertation project during MSc for JRF
qualification.details: Senior Research Fellow/Junior Research Fellow (Project): M.Sc. or M.Tech. in any area of life sciences with a good academic record. M.Sc. candidates must have cleared any National Level Eligibility Test (NET/GATE etc). Must have at least 2 years of research experience in laboratory settings for SRF. JRF candidates MUST have undertaken a minimum of 6 months dissertation project during MSc.

salary_details.details: Rs. 37,000/- to Rs. 42,000/- per month plus 27% HRA

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NII Senior Research Fellow/Junior Research Fellow (Project) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 23-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download NII Senior Research Fellow/Junior Research Fellow (Project) Job 2026 No

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NII Senior Research Fellow/Junior Research Fellow (Project) posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 23rd June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Senior Research Fellow/Junior Research Fellow (Project) position.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates need an M.Sc. or M.Tech. in life sciences with a good academic record. M.Sc. candidates must have cleared NET/GATE. SRF requires 2 years of research experience, and JRF requires a minimum 6-month dissertation project during MSc.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The salary offered ranges from Rs. 37,000/- to Rs. 42,000/- per month, plus 27% HRA.

faq.question: Q5. How can candidates apply for these positions?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply by sending their application via email to the address specified in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the NII recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an interview, which may be conducted offline or online.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an application fee of Rs. 100/- for General/OBC candidates. SC/ST and Women candidates are exempted from the fee.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: These are contract-based positions.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the National Institute of Immunology located?
faq.answer: The National Institute of Immunology is located in New Delhi, Delhi.

faq.question: Q10. What is the project tenure mentioned in the notification?
faq.answer: The project tenure is mentioned as 09th October 2026.
